params.amount: Maximum amount the spender can transfer

returns._0: bool Always returns true on success

params.amount: The base amount to calculate the fee on

returns._0: uint256 The UBI fee amount (10% of the input amount)

claimUBI().details: The claim amount comes from two sources:   1. Base UBI (newly minted G$)   2. Share of UBI pool (funded by dApp fees)

params._initialSupply: Initial token supply minted to the admin

params.amount: Amount of G$ to transfer to the UBI pool

params.to: Address to receive the minted tokens

params.amount: New daily UBI amount in G$ (with 18 decimals)

params.authorized: True to authorize, false to deauthorize

returns._0: bool Always returns true on success
bool Always returns true on success

params.status: True to verify, false to unverify

approve(address,uint256).notice: Approve another address to spend tokens on your behalf.

batchVerifyHumans(address[]).notice: Batch verify multiple humans (for migration from Celo).

calculateUBIFee(uint256).notice: Calculate the UBI fee for a given amount (used by dApps).

claimUBI().notice: Claim daily UBI. Must be a verified human. One claim per 24h.

constructor.notice: Initialize the GoodDollar token with admin and identity oracle.

fundUBIPool(uint256).notice: Fund the UBI pool. Called by dApps sending their UBI fee share.

mint(address,uint256).notice: Mint G$ tokens. Only callable by authorized minters (e.g. UBIClaimV2).

setAdmin(address).notice: Transfer admin privileges to a new address.

setDailyUBIAmount(uint256).notice: Update the daily UBI amount per verified human.

setMinter(address,bool).notice: Authorize or deauthorize a minter contract.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).notice: Transfer tokens from one address to another using allowance.

verifyHuman(address,bool).notice: Verify or unverify a human for UBI eligibility.

documentation.text:
@notice Fund the UBI pool. Called by dApps sending their UBI fee share.
 @param amount Amount of G$ to transfer to the UBI pool

@notice Batch verify multiple humans (for migration from Celo).
 @param humans Array of addresses to verify

@notice Update the daily UBI amount per verified human.
 @param amount New daily UBI amount in G$ (with 18 decimals)

@notice Update the identity oracle address.
 @param _oracle New identity oracle address

@notice Transfer admin privileges to a new address.
 @param _admin New admin address
